text: Welcome to InnerScope Hearing Technologies, trading on the OTC market under the ticker INND. We are a family led company with three generations of experience in hearing care, from a single audiology practice in the 1950s to a public company today. Our brands reach people where they already shop, through our operating partner OTCHealth. In October 2025, we announced a strategic alliance tied to Ainnova Tech's proposed acquisition of OTCHealth, a transaction that remains active. This message contains forward looking statements. Please review the important disclaimers on this site before making any investment decision.
